## Crypto\_2.Converters.encryptedCollectionFile variable

Converter for encrypted collection tombstone files. Validates the complete structure of an encrypted collection file.

**Signature:**

```typescript
encryptedCollectionFile: Converter<IEncryptedCollectionFile>
```
